security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Schema-driven editor for the pixelbrix.com content collections.
bundle.longDescription: Local desktop tool for editing the pixelbrix.com Astro content collections — projects, experiments, gallery. Reads frontmatter schemas from src/content.config.ts and renders them as native forms.
